title: onobrychis luristanica
intro: Onobrychis luristanica, also known as Persian clover, is a perennial legume native to the Middle East, particularly in Iran. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of coumarin, a natural anticoagulant, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Onobrychis luristanica include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antibacterial properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to treat cardiovascular and gastrointestinal disorders.
